case_title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.DBA GREAT VS. ASOKA WIMALASIRI,AKA ASOKA WILMALASIRI et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE ON SUMMONS & COMPLAINT; NOTICE TO PLNTF; JUDICIAL MEDIATION PILOT PROGRAM; VOLUNTARY EARLY MEDIATION PROGRAM; ADR INFORMATION PACKAGE; STIPULATION TO ADR; CASE MANAGEMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-09-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASOKA WIMALASIRI,AKA ASOKA WILMALASIRI INDIVIDUALLY, DBA HOUSE OF FUTONS $3,676.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $296.94 INTEREST, $205.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,178.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAD BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition had been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-19-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
